notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Otto Lopez reaches on a fielding error by first baseman Rafael Devers.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Xavier Edwards reaches on a missed catch error by pitcher Trevor McDonald, assist to first baseman Rafael Devers. Joe Mack scores. Esteury Ruiz to 3rd. Kyle Stowers to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Victor Bericoto pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Victor Bericoto flies out to right fielder Esteury Ruiz.

notableEvents.detail: Otto Lopez reaches on a fielding error by first baseman Rafael Devers.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Esteury Ruiz steals (14) 2nd base. Esteury Ruiz to 3rd. Esteury Ruiz advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by catcher Eric Haase.

notableEvents.label: Xavier Edwards GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Xavier Edwards grounds into a double play, shortstop Willy Adames to second baseman Luis Arraez to first baseman Rafael Devers. Jakob Marsee scores. Otto Lopez to 3rd. Kyle Stowers out at 2nd. Xavier Edwards out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Xavier Edwards rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Xavier Edwards grounds into a double play, shortstop Willy Adames to second baseman Luis Arraez to first baseman Rafael Devers. Jakob Marsee scores. Otto Lopez to 3rd. Kyle Stowers out at 2nd. Xavier Edwards out at 1st.
